title: Smooth Camera Movement
description: Mod that makes your Camera Movement Smooth!
body:
# Mod that makes your Camera Movement Smooth! 🎦
**Allow you to modify your normal camera movement to be more smooth 📺**

 
## Enviroments 🖨️
 
Only Client Side!


```
 **Fabric 1.20.1**
 **Fabric 1.21.1** 
 
 **Forge 1.20.1**

 **NeoForge 1.21.1**
```


## Default Keybindings ⌨️
 

```
**K - Switch between Normal Camera Movement and Smooth Camera Movement**
**0 - Open a GUI to change the smoothness of the Camera Movement**
```

 
## Example Video 📽️:

[https://i.imgur.com/i0lPJTp.gif](https://i.imgur.com/i0lPJTp.gif)

**Fabric Enviroment:**

- Fabric API
- Architectury API

**Forge & NeoForge Enviroment:**

- Architectury API
